page_content: RDEV470 Real Estate Development Case Studies (3 Credits) Real Estate Development Case Studies takes the principles learned in RDEV 250, 350 and 450 and takes an in depth look at a selection of local, national and international case studies in residential, commercial ofﬁce, retail and hospital and critically analyzes the success and failure, short term and long term of the projects. Prerequisite: RDEV450. Restriction: Must be in the Real Estate and the Built Environment major or Real Estate Development minor; and permission of ARCH-Real Estate Development.
